amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 9,095 in Electronics & Photo (See Top 100 in Electronics & Photo) 42 in Portable AM/FM Radios

features: WAVEBANDS: Listen to your favourite Medium Wave (AM / MW), Short Wave (SW) or FM radio stations.

MUSIC STREAM: This radio plays music files by MusicStream (which is Bluetooth BT compatible) source such as Mobile Phone. This can be music streaming sources such as Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer etc or music stored directly on your phone.
USB & SD CARD: Play MP3 tunes using the USB slot or MicroSD (TF) card with full control of playback, pause, next song, previous song etc
RETRO DESIGN - The beautifully designed cabinet has a fantastic retro look whilst providing modern ways to listen to your favourite music.
USB RECHARGEABLE: The lithium ion rechargeable battery provides upto 8 hrs playtime on a single charge. Charge using a normal USB 5v power source (USB adaptor not included)
description: From the manufacturer PERFECT MUSIC STREAMING DEVICE! This radio with music stream feature is the perfect device for those who love to immerse themselves in music. Connect your smartphone or laptop to stream and play music through the radio's quality speakers . This smart feature provides you with a versatile device that caters to different listening preferences. Enjoy a seamless listening experience as your favourite songs and playlists come to life in crisp, clear sound. 3 Band Radio This compact 3-band radio offers AM, FM, and SW (shortwave) reception, giving you access to a wide range of loca l and international broadcasts. With a simple, user-friendly design it’s perfect for home use, travel, or emergency situations. Enjoy clear sound, manual tuning and a built-in speaker in a lightweight, portable package. MP3 Via USB/SD This radio offers the versatility of not only tuning in to your favourite FM/AM/SW stations but also playing your own MP3 music files. With an MP3 feature, you can easily connect your device via USB or auxiliary input to enjoy your personalised music collection. Perfect for music enthusiasts who want the convenience of listening to radio broadcasts along with their own digital music library on one device. USB Powered This USB-powered radio offers convenient, plug and play operation without the need for constant change of batteries. Simply connect it to any USB powered source for reliable access to your favourite stations, making it an ideal choice for desks, travel, or emergency use. Rechargeable Battery This radio comes equipped with a built-in rechargeable battery, offering cordless convenience and long lasting playback. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, it ensures you can enjoy your favourite AM/FM/SW stations or music streaming anytime, without the hassle of replacing batteries.
